shellCommands.command: pwd && rg -n "function flatten|const flatten|flatten\(" src __tests__ tests 2>/dev/null | head -200 && printf '\nTop-level files:\n' && rg --files -g '!node_modules' | head -80

find . -path './node_modules' -prune -o -type f -print | head -120 && printf '\nFlatten references:\n' && grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git -E 'function flatten|const flatten|flatten\(' . | head -200

sed -n '1,160p' src/utils/flatten.ts && printf '
--- test ---
' && sed -n '1,240p' src/__tests__/utils/flatten.test.ts && printf '
--- package scripts ---
' && sed -n '1,180p' package.json && printf '
--- git status ---
' && git status --short

sed -n '1,160p' src/utils/isObject.ts && printf '
Object/date utility references:
' && grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules -E 'isDate|instanceof Date|Date\)' src | head -160 && printf '
Snapshots:
' && find src/__tests__ -type f -name '*.snap' -print | head -20

sed -n '1,220p' AGENTS.md && printf '
--- flatten snapshot ---
' && sed -n '1,180p' src/__tests__/utils/__snapshots__/flatten.test.ts.snap && printf '
--- recent history ---
' && git log -5 --oneline -- src/utils/flatten.ts src/utils/isObject.ts
